name: Ghostface Killah
bio: Ghostface Killah (Dennis Coles) is an American rapper and a prominent member of the Wu-Tang Clan. He is known for his emotional storytelling, unique slang, and prolific solo career, including the acclaimed album 'Supreme Clientele'.
facts: Frequently collaborates with Raekwon and Cappadonna.
His rapid-fire delivery and vivid imagery set him apart in hip-hop.
